---
title: "Fisher Information"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
set.seed(311)
theta_true <- 1/2
n_vec <- c(5, 20, 100, 500)
B <- 1000
plot_ls <- list()
for(l in 1:length(n_vec)) {
  mle_mean <- theta_true
  mle_var <- theta_true^2 / n_vec[l]
  mle_sd <- sqrt(mle_var)
  mle_vec <- replicate(1000, 1/mean(rexp(n_vec[l], theta_true)))
  plot_ls[[l]] <- data.frame(mle = mle_vec, n = n_vec[l]) |>
    ggplot(aes(x = mle))+
    geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)))  +
    stat_function(fun = dnorm, args = list(mean = mle_mean, sd = mle_sd), col = "orange") +
    xlim(c(mle_mean - 3 * mle_sd,mle_mean + 3 * mle_sd)) +
    labs(title = paste0("n = ", n_vec[l]))
}
gridExtra::grid.arrange(grobs = plot_ls)


```
